description: Style NoteThis shoe is ideal for those who don't want to compromise when it comes to the stylish look of their footwear - and the best part is that skechers have also paid attention to practicality. The shoe comes with a soft woven canvas fabric and suede upper in a lace up sporty casual shoe with stitching accents and vulcanized midsole. Product DetailsBlue shoe with fabric and leather upper, decorative synthetic overlays, stitched detailing and central lace-upsPadded tongue and innerThick rubber midsoleFlexible rubber traction outsole with textured grooves Material and CareLeather and fabricWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
